segments.text: I beseech you therefore, brethren, by the mercies of God, that you present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable to God, which is your reasonable service.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind, that you may prove what is that good and acceptable and perfect will of God.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For I say, through the grace given to me, to everyone who is among you, not to think of himself more highly than he ought to think, but to think soberly, as God has dealt to each one a measure of faith.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For as we have many members in one body, but all the members do not have the same function,
so we, being many, are one body in Christ, and individually members of one another.
Having then gifts differing according to the grace that is given to us, let us use them: if prophecy, let us prophesy in proportion to our faith;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: or ministry, let us use it in our ministering; he who teaches, in teaching;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: he who exhorts, in exhortation; he who gives, with liberality; he who leads, with diligence; he who shows mercy, with cheerfulness.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Let love be without hypocrisy. Abhor what is evil. Cling to what is good.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Be kindly affectionate to one another with brotherly love, in honor giving preference to one another;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: not lagging in diligence, fervent in spirit, serving the Lord;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: rejoicing in hope, patient in tribulation, continuing steadfastly in prayer;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: distributing to the needs of the saints, given to hospitality.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Bless those who persecute you; bless and do not curse.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Rejoice with those who rejoice, and weep with those who weep.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Be of the same mind toward one another. Do not set your mind on high things, but associate with the humble. Do not be wise in your own opinion.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Repay no one evil for evil. Have regard for good things in the sight of all men.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: If it is possible, as much as depends on you, live peaceably with all men.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Beloved, do not avenge yourselves, but rather give place to wrath;
Vengeance is Mine, I will repay,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: If your enemy is hungry, feed him; If he is thirsty, give him a drink; For in so doing you will heap coals of fire on his head.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
segments.speaker: Paul
